ddls:
CREATE TABLE "app_stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the app store */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the app store is based */,
  "store_url" TEXT /* URL of the app store */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of the app store (official, third-party) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the app store */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the app store data was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the app store being analyzed */,
  "num_malicious_apps" INTEGER /* Number of malicious apps found */,
  "num_total_apps" INTEGER /* Total number of apps studied */,
  "percentage_malicious" REAL /* Percentage of apps identified as malicious */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was conducted */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source used for the analysis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the analysis results */,
  "geographical_region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the app store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_analysis_results_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES app_stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_analysis_results_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Geographical region of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user within the organization */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date and time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the app store related to the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  "report_title" TEXT /* Title of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES app_stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "malicious_app_types" (
  "app_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app type */,
  "app_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the malicious app type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the app type */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the malicious app type (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "remediation_steps" TEXT /* Steps to mitigate the threat posed by the app type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "app_type_results" (
  "app_type_result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each app type result */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the analysis result */,
  "app_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the malicious app type */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of apps of this type found in the analysis */,
  "detection_method" TEXT /* Method used to detect the malicious app type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("app_type_result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_type_results_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES app_analysis_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_app_type_results_app_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("app_type_id") REFERENCES malicious_app_types ("app_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Last date the data source was checked for updates */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
